name: Explorer Shell
description: Application shell for documentation explorers: persistent header with search, collapsible sidebar with layered navigation, scrollable main content, and floating control panel.

slots.header: Fixed header bar with logo, search trigger (Cmd+K hint), and controls toggle
slots.sidebar: Collapsible nav sidebar with filter input and expandable layer groups
slots.main: Scrollable content area with max-width constraint
slots.search-modal: Full-screen search overlay with focus trap
slots.hud-panel: Floating control panel for style/mode/shape switching
